command: $adapters = Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_.Status -eq 'Up'}; Write-Output "=== Network Info ==="; foreach ($a in $adapters) { $ip = (Get-NetIPAddress -InterfaceIndex $a.ifIndex -AddressFamily IPv4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).IPAddress; Write-Output "Interface: $($a.Name)"; Write-Output "Type: $($a.InterfaceDescription)"; Write-Output "IP Address: $ip"; Write-Output "MAC: $($a.MacAddress)"; Write-Output "---" }; $wifi = Get-NetConnectionProfile -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($wifi) { Write-Output "Connected Network: $($wifi.Name)"; Write-Output "Network Category: $($wifi.NetworkCategory)" }
description: معلومات الشبكة: عنوان IP واسم الشبكة المتصل بها
